name: Outdoor Patio Propane Tank Cover - Cement Gray - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Steel Weather-Resistant Appliance Cover
description:
Get ready for grilling season with this Outdoor Patio Propane Tank Cover from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Constructed of weather-resistant aluminum, this cement gray cover easily conceals an unappealing propane tank while also protecting it from the elements. Plus, a convenient built-in handle allows you to easily lift and carry the cover. Do not use as a table.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather ∙ Create ∙ Enjoy
